name: Ecosystem - Flora
description: Wild ecology for vanilla flowers, tallgrass, ferns, berries, aquatic plants, and trees. Seasonal spread, cell competition, niche stress, soil succession (meadow enriches; heather/gorse deplete). Spread-only mode, Terrain Slabs guard, fallow drip on spread. Third-party plants via ecologyParticipant JSON; berry trait cloning with optional mutations; toned aquatic seasonal spread.
